fields.name: outstandingTotal
fields.note: money whole-naira as-built (sum of open debt remaining); S-1 reconciliation -> integer kobo

fields.name: recoveredThisMonth
fields.note: money whole-naira as-built (payments since month start on non-archived debts); S-1 -> kobo

fields.name: dueTodayTotal
fields.note: money whole-naira as-built (open debts due same calendar day); S-1 -> kobo

fields.name: overdueTotal
fields.note: money whole-naira as-built (open debts with dueDate before today); S-1 -> kobo

fields.name: activity
fields.note: capped to 8 in watchDashboard; dashboard body previews first 3; feed shape described below

fields.name: hasAnyCustomers
fields.note: drives empty-state CTA (record debt vs add customer)

filtersOrSort: activity sorted by at desc, then take(cap=8)

reads.source: DashboardData.activity (nested list; also standalone via repo.watchActivity())

fields.name: subtitle
fields.note: customer name, optionally with debt note or reminder channel (SMS/WhatsApp/Call)

fields.name: amount
fields.note: money whole-naira as-built; null for reminder rows; S-1 -> kobo

fields.name: at
fields.note: event timestamp; feed sorted desc by this

filtersOrSort: dashboard caps at 8 and previews take(3)

fields.name: ownerName
fields.note: greeting uses first word; avatar initials; empty-string default in DB

fields.name: businessName
fields.note: header title; empty-string default in DB

reads.note: Stream value may be null before profile exists (watchSingleOrNull). Only ownerName + businessName are consumed by this screen; other profile columns not read here.

fields.name: hasUnread
fields.note: bell-icon badge dot; derived from AppNotifications.read

reads.note: Unpowered AI placeholder — no data wired. Maps to the 501 insights surface (GET /insights/dashboard per conventions.md AI section, debit 5 on success, sourceScreens include this). Present but renders nothing until an insight source exists.

authContext.note: No explicit role gate in the screen; basic dashboard is core-recovery (per conventions, never plan-gated). Root authenticated screen reachable by any signed-in user of the tenant.

special.note: realtime=true reflects as-built drift Streams via StreamBuilder (live re-render on local writes); backend equivalent is offline-first sync/delta-pull, not a socket.
